issuer: MakerDAO / Sky Protocol governance (MKR / SKY governance token, not a simple corporate issuer)
regulatory_jurisdiction: Decentralised protocol; jurisdictional/legal perimeter complex (no single corporate issuer authorised under any of GENIUS / MiCA / NYDFS / BoE)
reserve_or_collateral: Excess (over-)collateralisation by governance-approved collateral assets deposited into Maker Vaults; backing value greater than Dai/USDS debt (CLAIM_098). USDC<->USDS 1:1 PSM-style on-ramp/off-ramp via Sky.money at the user-facing layer (CLAIM_102).
redemption_right: No direct fiat redemption right from a corporate issuer; users open / close their own Vault positions, and USDC<->USDS swap at 1:1 with zero fees and slippage is advertised at the user-facing Sky.money layer (CLAIM_102).
direct_redeemer: Anyone with sufficient governance-approved collateral can mint Dai/USDS via a Maker Vault (CLAIM_098); USDC<->USDS conversion is available via Sky.money subject to jurisdictional gating (sUSDS, stUSDS, and Ecosystem Rewards entry points are flagged "Currently unavailable in the US" per CLAIM_102).
assurance_or_report: Whitepapers and protocol docs; no fiat-style monthly reserve attestation; protocol transparency relies on on-chain Vault data and Oracle feeds.
interest_or_yield: Dai Savings Rate / Sky Savings Rate paid through sUSDS (CLAIM_100, CLAIM_102) — distinguishes from fiat-backed payment stablecoins which generally cannot pay holder yield.
freeze_blacklist_pause: Governance / smart-contract layer: Vault liquidation through automated Maker Protocol Collateral Auctions with Reverse Collateral Auction surplus return and Protocol Surplus / MKR dilution to cover auction shortfalls (CLAIM_099); Global Settlers / Emergency Oracles have unilateral Emergency Shutdown authority (CLAIM_101).
bank_deposit_dependency: Indirect via RWA collateral and custodians where applicable
t_bill_repo_mmf_dependency: Indirect via RWA Vaults / PSM USDC bridge
primary_use: DeFi collateral, lending, stable unit, savings module, USDC<->USDS bridge
key_risks: Collateral liquidation, oracle / governance risk, RWA / custody risk, peg liquidity, governance attack surface, US-jurisdiction unavailability of yield modules

issuer: Ethena Labs / Ethena BVI (Mint User counterparty)
regulatory_jurisdiction: Protocol / issuer structure to verify; not fiat-backed payment stablecoin
reserve_or_collateral: Delta-neutral synthetic dollar at 1:1 collateralisation via short perpetual futures hedge of approximately the same notional as backing assets (CLAIM_103); Off-Exchange Settlement custody with Ethena delegating but never transferring custody to centralised derivatives exchanges (CLAIM_104); Reserve Fund holding stablecoins (USDC, USDT) for USD-M contracts plus a smaller ETH allocation for ETH-M contracts as additional margin of safety (CLAIM_106). Overview describes whitelisted mint/redeem and external liquidity-pool acquisition (CLAIM_067).
redemption_right: Only whitelisted Mint Users that complete KYC/AML/onboarding may create or redeem USDe directly with Ethena BVI; Holding Users do not have a direct redemption right with Ethena BVI (CLAIM_065).
direct_redeemer: Whitelisted Ethena Mint Users from permitted jurisdictions; U.S. users are not eligible to become Mint Users (CLAIM_065/066).
assurance_or_report: Monthly custodian attestations validating existence/control/value of USDe backing assets and stating none reside directly on exchange partners (CLAIM_105); separate audits, LlamaRisk PoR, and Reserve Fund pages also referenced. None is a financial-statement audit; the hedging system and derivatives-exchange leg are not covered by the custodian attestation.
interest_or_yield: USDe itself does not generate interest or return and holders are not entitled to reserve returns; sUSDe is the separate reward-accruing wrapper (CLAIM_066); distinguish USDe from sUSDe.
freeze_blacklist_pause: Not disclosed in archived source for direct contract-level controls
bank_deposit_dependency: Indirect through Off-Exchange Settlement custodians and stablecoin Reserve Fund composition; backing assets do NOT reside directly on derivatives exchanges per CLAIM_104 and CLAIM_105.
t_bill_repo_mmf_dependency: Indirect via Reserve Fund stablecoin allocation (USDC / USDT) for USD-M contracts (CLAIM_106).
primary_use: Crypto-native synthetic dollar, DeFi yield via sUSDe, collateral asset
key_risks: Basis/funding-rate reversal risk on short perpetual hedge, off-exchange custodian default, derivatives-exchange operational disruption, Reserve Fund sizing relative to negative-funding episodes, governance and 4/10 multi-sig key compromise, peg liquidity, sUSDe APY sustainability if funding rates compress
primary_sources: USDE_001-USDE_009; CLAIM_065; CLAIM_066; CLAIM_067; CLAIM_103; CLAIM_104; CLAIM_105; CLAIM_106
